ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶•ŗ¶ģ ŗ¶łŗ¶Ļŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßÄ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ē: ŗ¶Öŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶§ ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ď

ŗ¶™ŗßčŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ē ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶ēŗßĀŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤, ŗ¶Üŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶ā, ŗ¶®ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Üŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶ēŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶°ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į, ŗ¶Öŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶üŗßáŗ¶≤, ŗ¶łŗßĀŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑ŗßÄ ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶†ŗßčŗ¶°ŗ¶ľ, ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ ŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶†ŗ¶Ņ, ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶ôŗßćŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶°ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶¶ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶§ŗßÉŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶¶ŗßčŗ¶áŗ¶ęŗßčŗ¶¶ŗßá 
ŗ¶ēŗßčŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶ďŗ¶óŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ęŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶Üŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ ŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶Ė, ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶ł ŗ¶óŗßĀŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶§, ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ĻŗßĀŗ¶≤ ŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶†ŗ¶Ņ
ŗ¶Öŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶∂ŗ¶® ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶įŗ¶É ŗ¶Üŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ł ŗ¶Üŗ¶≤ŗßÄ ŗ¶ģŗßčŗ¶óŗ¶≤
ŗ¶Üŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ļ ŗ¶łŗ¶ôŗßćŗ¶óŗßÄŗ¶§ŗ¶É ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ę ŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶Ė
ŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶É ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ę ŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶Ė
ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßčŗ¶°ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶∂ŗ¶® ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶∂ŗßąŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶∂ ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē
ŗ¶∂ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ē: ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗßĀ ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶ā (ŗ¶Öŗ¶įŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¶)
ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßÄŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ďŗ¶™ŗ¶Ņ: ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĻŗßÄŗ¶¶ ŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤
ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßčŗ¶°ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶∂ŗ¶® ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶≠: ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶ďŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶Üŗ¶Ļŗ¶ģŗßáŗ¶¶, ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ģŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶Üŗ¶≤ŗßÄ, ŗ¶Üŗ¶łŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģ ŗ¶łŗßąŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶¶, ŗ¶Öŗ¶ěŗßćŗ¶úŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶≤ŗßĀŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶öŗßáŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶ü, ŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßÄŗ¶™ ŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®, ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßčŗ¶¶ ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶ēŗ¶į, ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗßčŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺ
ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶Źŗ¶ęŗ¶ď: ŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶įŗßÄŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ł ŗ¶™ŗ¶Ņ. ŗ¶ēŗßčŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®
ŗß®ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗß®ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ (ŗ¶™ŗßčŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ē) ŗ¶łŗ¶Ļŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßÄ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ēŗ¶É ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶öŗßÄ ŗ¶¶ŗßĀŗ¶¨ŗßá
ŗß©ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶łŗ¶Ļŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßÄ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ēŗ¶É ŗ¶Įŗ¶∂ ŗ¶įŗ¶ėŗßĀŗ¶¨ŗ¶āŗ¶∂ŗßÄ
ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶Čŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶° ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶É ŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßĀ ŗ¶öŗßĆŗ¶ßŗßĀŗ¶įŗßÄ
ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶Čŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶° ŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ü: ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ĻŗßĀŗ¶≤ ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶¨
ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņ-ŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ā ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶¨ŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗßé ŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶āŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶á (ŗ¶ęŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ēŗ¶ł ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗßáŗ¶°)
ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶Ź: ŗ¶Öŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ú ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶§
ŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Źŗ¶ęŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶ł ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶üŗßĀŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ď: ŗ¶ęŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ēŗ¶ł
ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Üŗ¶á ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶üŗßĀŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ď: ŗ¶ęŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ēŗ¶ł
ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Üŗ¶á ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ü: ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶≤ ŗ¶∂ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺ
ŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßčŗ¶ģŗßčŗ¶∂ŗ¶®: ŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ü ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶ü ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶üŗßĀŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ďŗ¶ú ŗ¶Źŗ¶®ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶ł
ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶®: ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ĻŗßĀŗ¶≤ ŗ¶®ŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗ¶ĺ
ŗ¶™ŗßčŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ü ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßčŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶ģ ŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶Ė

ta.title: ŗģĶŗĮÜŗģ≤ŗĮćŗģēŗģģŗĮć ŗģüŗĮĀ ŗģ§ ŗģúŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗģŅŗģ≥ŗĮć - ŗģÖŗģ§ŗģŅŗģēŗģĺŗģįŗģ™ŗĮćŗģ™ŗĮāŗģįŗĮćŗģĶ ŗģüŗĮÄŗģöŗģįŗĮć | ŗģ§ŗģŅŗģįŗĮąŗģĮŗģįŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗĮĀŗģēŗģ≥ŗģŅŗģ≤ŗĮć | 26 ŗģúŗĮāŗģ©ŗĮć 2026
ta.description:
ŗģĶŗĮÜŗģ≤ŗĮćŗģēŗģģŗĮć ŗģüŗĮĀ ŗģ§ŗģŅ ŗģúŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗģŅŗģ≥ŗĮć ūüĆīūü™Ė 
ŗģĮŗĮá ŗģúŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗģŅŗģ≥ŗĮć ŗģ§ŗĮč ŗģöŗĮáŗģÉŗģ™ŗĮć ŗģĻŗĮą, ŗģ™ŗģįŗĮć ŗģĮŗĮá ŗģ≤ŗģĺŗģēŗĮć? ŗģ™ŗģŅŗģ≤ŗĮćŗģēŗĮĀŗģ≤ŗĮć ŗģ®ŗģĻŗģŅ ūüėéūü§£

ŗģüŗĮÄŗģöŗģįŗĮć ŗģáŗģ™ŗĮćŗģ™ŗĮčŗģ§ŗĮĀ ŗģĶŗĮÜŗģ≥ŗģŅŗģĮŗģĺŗģēŗģŅŗģĪŗģ§ŗĮĀ.

#WelcomeToTheJungle, ŗģúŗĮāŗģ©ŗĮć 26, 2026 ŗģģŗĮĀŗģ§ŗģ≤ŗĮć ŗģ§ŗģŅŗģįŗĮąŗģĮŗģįŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗĮĀŗģēŗģ≥ŗģŅŗģ≤ŗĮć ŗģēŗĮĀŗģīŗģ™ŗĮćŗģ™ŗģģŗĮć ŗģ§ŗĮäŗģüŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗĮĀŗģēŗģŅŗģĪŗģ§ŗĮĀ ūüćŅ

ŗģ®ŗģüŗģŅŗģ™ŗĮćŗģ™ŗĮĀ: ŗģÖŗģēŗĮć‚ÄĆŗģ∑ŗģĮŗĮć ŗģēŗĮĀŗģģŗģĺŗģįŗĮć, ŗģöŗĮĀŗģ©ŗģŅŗģ≤ŗĮć ŗģ∑ŗĮÜŗģüŗĮćŗģüŗģŅ, ŗģ§ŗģŅŗģ∑ŗģĺ ŗģ™ŗģ§ŗģĺŗģ©ŗģŅ, ŗģúŗģĺŗģēŗĮćŗģēŗĮĀŗģ≤ŗģŅŗģ©ŗĮć ŗģ™ŗĮÜŗģįŗĮćŗģ©ŗģĺŗģ£ŗĮćŗģüŗģłŗĮć, ŗģÖŗģįŗĮćŗģ∑ŗģ§ŗĮć ŗģĶŗģįŗĮćŗģöŗģŅ, ŗģúŗģĺŗģēŗĮćŗģēŗģŅ ŗģ∑ŗĮćŗģįŗģĺŗģÉŗģ™ŗĮć, ŗģ™ŗģįŗĮáŗģ∑ŗĮć ŗģįŗģĺŗģĶŗģ≤ŗĮć, ŗģįŗģĶŗĮÄŗģ©ŗģĺ ŗģüŗģĺŗģ£ŗĮćŗģüŗģ©ŗĮć, ŗģ≤ŗģĺŗģįŗģĺ ŗģ§ŗģ§ŗĮćŗģ§ŗģĺ, ŗģÉŗģ™ŗģįŗģŅŗģ§ŗģĺ ŗģúŗģ≤ŗģĺŗģ≤ŗĮć, ŗģúŗģĺŗģ©ŗģŅ ŗģ≤ŗĮÄŗģĶŗģįŗĮć, ŗģ∑ŗĮćŗģįŗĮáŗģĮŗģĺŗģłŗĮć ŗģ§ŗģ≤ŗĮćŗģ™ŗģüŗĮá, ŗģ§ŗĮĀŗģ∑ŗģĺŗģįŗĮć ŗģēŗģ™ŗĮāŗģįŗĮć, ŗģįŗģĺŗģúŗĮćŗģēŗĮĀ ŗģ∑ŗģĺŗģįŗģēŗĮć, ŗģįŗģĺŗģúŗĮćŗģēŗĮĀ ŗģ∑ŗģĺŗģįŗģēŗĮć, ŗģēŗģŅ. ŗģÖŗģÉŗģ™ŗĮćŗģ§ŗģĺŗģ™ŗĮć ŗģ∑ŗģŅŗģĶŗĮćŗģ§ŗģĺŗģöŗģĺŗģ©ŗģŅ, ŗģģŗĮĀŗģēŗĮáŗģ∑ŗĮć ŗģ§ŗģŅŗģĶŗģĺŗģįŗģŅ, ŗģĮŗģ∑ŗĮćŗģ™ŗģĺŗģ≤ŗĮć ŗģ∑ŗģįŗĮćŗģģŗģĺ, ŗģēŗģŅŗģįŗģ£ŗĮć ŗģēŗĮĀŗģģŗģĺŗģįŗĮć, ŗģúŗģĺŗģēŗģŅŗģįŗĮć ŗģČŗģöŗĮáŗģ©ŗĮć, ŗģĶŗģŅŗģ®ŗĮćŗģ§ŗĮĀ ŗģ§ŗģĺŗģįŗģĺ ŗģöŗģŅŗģôŗĮć, ŗģäŗģįŗĮćŗģĶŗģöŗģŅ. ŗģįŗģĶŗĮĀŗģüŗĮáŗģ≤ŗģĺ, ŗģĻŗĮáŗģģŗģ®ŗĮćŗģ§ŗĮć ŗģ™ŗģĺŗģ£ŗĮćŗģüŗĮá, ŗģ™ŗģŅŗģįŗģŅŗģúŗĮáŗģ®ŗĮćŗģ§ŗģŅŗģį ŗģēŗģ≤ŗģĺ, ŗģÉŗģ™ŗĮÜŗģįŗĮčŗģłŗĮć ŗģēŗģĺŗģ©ŗĮć (ŗģÖŗģįŗĮćŗģúŗĮĀŗģ©ŗĮć), ŗģģŗģĪŗĮąŗģ®ŗĮćŗģ§ ŗģ™ŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗģúŗĮć ŗģ§ŗĮÄŗģįŗĮć ŗģúŗģŅ, ŗģ™ŗĮĀŗģ©ŗģŅŗģ§ŗĮć ŗģáŗģłŗĮćŗģłŗģĺŗģįŗĮć, ŗģöŗĮĀŗģ§ŗĮáŗģ∑ŗĮć ŗģ™ŗĮÜŗģįŗĮćŗģįŗģŅ, ŗģúŗĮÄŗģ§ŗĮĀ ŗģĶŗģįŗĮćŗģģŗģĺ, ŗģĶŗģŅŗģįŗĮĀŗģĻŗģŅ ŗģēŗĮčŗģüŗĮćŗģĶŗģĺŗģįŗģĺ, ŗģÜŗģ§ŗģŅŗģ§ŗĮćŗģĮŗģĺ ŗģöŗģŅŗģôŗĮć, ŗģ™ŗģĺŗģēŗĮćŗģĮŗģĺ ŗģ™ŗģĺŗģ©ŗĮĀŗģ∑ŗģĺŗģ≤ŗģŅ 

ŗģŹ.ŗģŹ. ŗģ®ŗģ§ŗģŅŗģĮŗģĺŗģ§ŗĮćŗģĶŗģĺŗģ≤ŗģĺ, ŗģēŗĮáŗģ™ŗĮć ŗģÜŗģÉŗģ™ŗĮć ŗģēŗĮĀŗģüŗĮć ŗģÉŗģ™ŗģŅŗģ≤ŗģŅŗģģŗĮćŗģłŗĮć & ŗģłŗĮćŗģüŗģĺŗģįŗĮć ŗģłŗĮćŗģüŗĮĀŗģüŗģŅŗģĮŗĮč18 ŗģĶŗģīŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗĮĀŗģēŗģŅŗģĪŗģ§ŗĮĀ

snippet.title: Ekdev Limbu - Chameli [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Chameli - Ekdev Limbu (Official Video)

A broken-down car. Three unexpected encounters. One unforgettable journey.
Follow Ekdev through Chitwan as he experiences love, romance, and adventure in the most carefree way. Where reality and dreams merge into moments that change everything.

snippet.title: Diwana Hai Ye Man (From "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke") Salman Khan, Rani, Preity |Sonu Nigam & Alka Y
snippet.description:
"Diwana Hai Ye Man" ke jaadu mein kho jaaiye, jo 2001 ki blockbuster film "Chori Chori Chupke Chupke" ka ek behtareen romantic track hai. Sonu Nigam aur Alka Yagnik ki awaaz mein ye gaana aaj bhi dilon ko chhu leta hai. Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee aur Preity Zinta ki chemistry aur Anu Malik ka sangeet ise ek evergreen hit banata hai.

Is nostalgic melody ko enjoy karein aur apne doston ke saath share karein!

Credits:

Singer(s): Sonu Nigam & Alka Yagnik
Music Director: Anu Malik
Lyricist: Sameer
Cast: Salman Khan, Rani Mukherjee, Preity Zinta
Director: Abbas-Mustan

Lyrics :-
Raatein hui roshan ab meri ,,
Andhero bhari shab na rahi ,,
Tu meri hai mai tera hu,,
Tu Shaam meri savera tu ,,
aawara dil ka basera tu ,,
Hm Dil me lgaa le dera tu ,,

Gujaara naa yaara na ab tere bina ,,
Na raatein savera na tere bina,,
Gujaara naa yaara na ab tere bina ,,
Na raatein savera na tere bina,,

Jarurat naa laagay hai ab koi jabse hai tu milgea ,, dil ko hai tu milgea  ,,
Murjhaaye they khaabo k aasmaa tu aaya har khaab khilgea ,, hm mera har khaab khilgea ,,

Tu chand mera mai sitara tu ,,
Ishq saare ka sara tu ,,
Mai dariya hu kinara tu ,,
Hm dil may lgaa le dera tu  ,,

Gujaara naa yaara na ab tere bina ,,
Na raatein savera na tere bina,,
Gujaara naa yaara na ab tere bina ,,
Na raatein savera na tere bina,,

#guzara #ritoriba #gullu #kaira #kushaira #trending #romantic

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Herai Basai | Extended Version | OFFICIAL VISUALIZER
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies, since so many of you said Herai Basai felt too short, we wanted to give it a little more life by making an extended version. We asked you all to send in videos with the people, places, pets, or anything you love, and we were truly overwhelmed by the incredible flood of love and support that came in. Watching all your beautiful videos made us smile so much, and it meant the world to see how deeply this song connected with you. We‚Äôre so sorry we couldn‚Äôt fit every single submission, but please know we‚Äôre endlessly grateful to everyone who took the time to share something so special with us. We hope this video makes you smile and fills you with warmth, because I was smiling ear to ear when I watched it for the first time too ;)

snippet.title: DRAGON Hindi Trailer | Jr NTR | Prashanth Neel | Anil Kapoor | Ravi Basrur | NTRNeel
snippet.description:
DRAGON Official Trailer (Hindi) : Man of Masses Jr NTR is BACK! | Prashanth Neel | Anil Kapoor | NTR 31

The Man of Masses Jr NTR unleashes absolute fury in the highly anticipated Hindi trailer of DRAGON! Directed by the mastermind behind KGF and Salaar, Prashanth Neel, prepare to enter a gritty, high-stakes world of the Golden Triangle.

Set against the dark backdrop of 1967, witness the ultimate clash as Luger (Jr NTR) faces off against the Chief of India's Narcotics Bureau, Raghuveer Rathod (Anil Kapoor). A cinematic storm is brewing. Are you ready for the ultimate destruction protocol?

Hitting cinemas worldwide on June 11, 2027.

snippet.title: Toxic New Teaser + Hrithik Roshan Comeback + Peddi Trailer & NTR Neel Dragon | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Toxic New Teaser + Hrithik Roshan Comeback + Peddi Trailer & NTR Neel Dragon Reaction by Deeksha Sharma. Yash is back with Toxic & Ramayana Trailer in ComicCon 2026 while Ram Charan Peddi Trailer with Janhvi Kapoor will be full of Action & Unexpected Twists but NTR Prashanth Neel Dragon Glimpse makes record with Teaser Length while Hrithik Roshan Next Film Announcement is just around the Corner & Dhamaal 4 Cocktail 2 Welcome 3 will take on Alpha Alia Bhatt at Box Office but Dhurandhar Ranveer Singh Comeback with YRF will shape future of Bollywood in ages to compete against SS Rajamouli Varanasi Teaser release this year very soon! What are you most excited for? Do leave Comments below.

#ToxicTeaser #PeddiTrailer #NTRNeelDragon

Applause Entertainment, Sebagai bagian dari Aditya Birla Group, Applause Entertainment terkenal karena memproduksi serial drama, film, dokumenter, dan animasi berkualitas tinggi. Dikenal dengan film-film hits seperti Black Warrant, Scam 1992, Tanaav, Do Aur Do Pyaar, Zwigato, Undekhi, Modern Masters: S.S Rajamouli, Applause berkolaborasi dengan platform terkemuka termasuk Netflix, Amazon Prime Video, dan SonyLIV.

Kan liefde echt verloren gaan? Kan iemands thuis worden afgenomen?

Main Vaapas Aaunga is het verhaal van een jongen en een meisje, maar ook van een land.

Applause Entertainment, onderdeel van de Aditya Birla Group, staat bekend om de productie van hoogwaardige dramaseries, films, documentaires en animaties. Bekend van hits als Black Warrant, Scam 1992, Tanaav, Do Aur Do Pyaar, Zwigato, Undekhi en Modern Masters: S.S. Rajamouli, werkt Applause samen met toonaangevende platforms zoals Netflix, Amazon Prime Video en SonyLIV.

ŗįúŗĪāŗį®ŗĪć 12, 2026ŗį® ŗįģŗĪÄ ŗįłŗįģŗĪÄŗį™ŗįāŗį≤ŗĪčŗį®ŗįŅ ŗį•ŗįŅŗįĮŗĪáŗįüŗįįŗĪćŗį≤ŗį≤ŗĪč ŗįĶŗįŅŗį°ŗĪĀŗį¶ŗį≤.

ŗģÜŗģ§ŗģŅŗģ§ŗĮćŗģĮŗģĺ ŗģ™ŗģŅŗģįŗĮćŗģ≤ŗģĺ ŗģēŗĮĀŗģīŗĮĀŗģģŗģ§ŗĮćŗģ§ŗģŅŗģ©ŗĮć ŗģíŗģįŗĮĀ ŗģÖŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗģģŗģĺŗģ© ŗģÖŗģ™ŗĮćŗģ≥ŗģĺŗģłŗĮć ŗģéŗģ©ŗĮćŗģüŗģįŗĮćŗģüŗĮÜŗģĮŗģŅŗģ©ŗĮćŗģģŗĮÜŗģ©ŗĮćŗģüŗĮć, ŗģČŗģĮŗģįŗĮćŗģ§ŗģį ŗģ®ŗģĺŗģüŗģēŗģ§ŗĮć ŗģ§ŗĮäŗģüŗģįŗĮćŗģēŗģ≥ŗĮć, ŗģ§ŗģŅŗģįŗĮąŗģ™ŗĮćŗģ™ŗģüŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗģ≥ŗĮć, ŗģÜŗģĶŗģ£ŗģ™ŗĮćŗģ™ŗģüŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗģ≥ŗĮć ŗģģŗģĪŗĮćŗģĪŗĮĀŗģģŗĮć ŗģÖŗģ©ŗģŅŗģģŗĮáŗģ∑ŗģ©ŗĮćŗģēŗģ≥ŗĮąŗģ§ŗĮć ŗģ§ŗģĮŗģĺŗģįŗģŅŗģ™ŗĮćŗģ™ŗģ§ŗģŅŗģ≤ŗĮć ŗģ™ŗĮĀŗģēŗģīŗĮćŗģ™ŗĮÜŗģĪŗĮćŗģĪŗģ§ŗĮĀ. ŗģ™ŗģŅŗģ≥ŗģĺŗģēŗĮć ŗģĶŗģĺŗģįŗģ©ŗĮćŗģüŗĮć, ŗģłŗĮćŗģēŗĮáŗģģŗĮć 1992, ŗģ§ŗģ©ŗģĺŗģĶŗĮć, ŗģ§ŗĮč ŗģÖŗģĶŗĮĀŗģįŗĮć ŗģ§ŗĮč ŗģ™ŗģŅŗģĮŗģĺŗģįŗĮć, ŗģłŗĮćŗģĶŗģŅŗģēŗģüŗĮč, ŗģČŗģ£ŗĮćŗģüŗĮáŗģēŗģŅ, ŗģģŗģĺŗģüŗģįŗĮćŗģ©ŗĮć ŗģģŗģĺŗģłŗĮćŗģüŗģįŗĮćŗģłŗĮć: ŗģéŗģłŗĮć.ŗģéŗģłŗĮć. ŗģįŗģĺŗģúŗģģŗĮĆŗģ≤ŗģŅ ŗģ™ŗĮčŗģ©ŗĮćŗģĪ ŗģĶŗĮÜŗģĪŗĮćŗģĪŗģŅŗģ™ŗĮć ŗģ™ŗģüŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗģ≥ŗĮĀŗģēŗĮćŗģēŗĮĀŗģ™ŗĮć ŗģ™ŗĮÜŗģĮŗģįŗĮć ŗģ™ŗĮÜŗģĪŗĮćŗģĪ ŗģÖŗģ™ŗĮćŗģ≥ŗģĺŗģłŗĮć, ŗģ®ŗĮÜŗģüŗĮćŗģÉŗģ™ŗģŅŗģ≥ŗģŅŗģēŗĮćŗģłŗĮć, ŗģÖŗģģŗĮáŗģöŗģĺŗģ©ŗĮć ŗģ™ŗģŅŗģįŗĮąŗģģŗĮć ŗģĶŗĮÄŗģüŗģŅŗģĮŗĮč ŗģģŗģĪŗĮćŗģĪŗĮĀŗģģŗĮć ŗģöŗĮčŗģ©ŗģŅ ŗģ≤ŗģŅŗģĶŗĮć ŗģČŗģ≥ŗĮćŗģ≥ŗģŅŗģüŗĮćŗģü ŗģģŗĮĀŗģ©ŗĮćŗģ©ŗģ£ŗģŅ ŗģ§ŗģ≥ŗģôŗĮćŗģēŗģ≥ŗĮĀŗģüŗģ©ŗĮć ŗģáŗģ£ŗĮąŗģ®ŗĮćŗģ§ŗĮĀ ŗģöŗĮÜŗģĮŗģ≤ŗĮćŗģ™ŗģüŗĮĀŗģēŗģŅŗģĪŗģ§ŗĮĀ.

bn.description:
ŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßčŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶łŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶Ņŗ¶á ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ¶Įŗßáŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßá? ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ď ŗ¶ĻŗßÉŗ¶¶ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶•ŗßáŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ėŗ¶į ŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ?

‚Äėŗ¶ģŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ł ŗ¶Üŗ¶Čŗ¶ôŗßćŗ¶óŗ¶ĺ‚Äô ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ¶ď ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ģŗßáŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶óŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™, ŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗßĀ ŗ¶Źŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶įŗ¶ď ŗ¶óŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ŗ•§
ŗ¶Üŗ¶™ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶§ŗßÄ ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑ŗ¶ĺŗ¶óŗßÉŗ¶Ļŗßá ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶õŗßá ŗßßŗß®ŗ¶á ŗ¶úŗßĀŗ¶® ŗß®ŗß¶ŗß®ŗß¨ŗ•§

ŗ¶áŗ¶ģŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶ú ŗ¶Üŗ¶≤ŗßÄŗ¶į ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶öŗ¶≤ŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶į

ŗ¶Öŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßá: ŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗßé ŗ¶¶ŗßčŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶ěŗßćŗ¶ú, ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßĀŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶® ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļ, ŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶¶ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ā ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶∂ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗßÄ

ŗ¶łŗ¶āŗ¶óŗßÄŗ¶§ŗ¶É ŗ¶Ź ŗ¶Üŗ¶į ŗ¶įŗ¶Ļŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶® 
ŗ¶ēŗ¶•ŗ¶ĺŗ¶É ŗ¶áŗ¶įŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤
ŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Ėŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶áŗ¶ģŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶ú ŗ¶Üŗ¶≤ŗßÄ, ŗ¶®ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶Ļŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ
ŗ¶ęŗ¶üŗßčŗ¶óŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ęŗ¶Ņŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ē: ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗ¶≠ŗßáŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ęŗ¶®ŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶Üŗ¶áŗ¶Źŗ¶łŗ¶łŗ¶Ņ
ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßčŗ¶°ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶∂ŗ¶® ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶łŗßĀŗ¶ģŗ¶® ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶į
ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¶ŗ¶ē: ŗ¶Üŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶ú
ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶Čŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶° ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ď ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßčŗ¶°ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶∂ŗ¶® ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶Čŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶° ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶ßŗßÄŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶® ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶į
ŗ¶ēŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶ģ ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶É ŗ¶∂ŗßÄŗ¶§ŗ¶≤ ŗ¶áŗ¶ēŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ ŗ¶∂ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺ
ŗ¶≤ŗßĀŗ¶ē ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶łŗßčŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶óŗßčŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗßÄ
ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņ-ŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ā ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶Öŗ¶≤ŗßčŗ¶ē ŗ¶¶ŗßá
ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶ā ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶į: ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶∂ ŗ¶õŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶Źŗ¶łŗ¶Ź
ŗ¶łŗ¶Ļŗ¶Įŗßčŗ¶óŗßÄ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ē: ŗ¶łŗßĀŗ¶įŗ¶ú ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ
ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶•ŗ¶ģ ŗ¶łŗ¶Ļŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßÄ ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ēŗ¶É ŗ¶Üŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶® ŗ¶ęŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶ł
ŗ¶™ŗßčŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ü ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶ďŗ¶óŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßá
ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗ¶ēŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺ: (ŗ¶Źŗ¶áŗ¶ö-ŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶®) ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ĻŗßĀŗ¶≤ ŗ¶®ŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶Ļŗ¶Ņŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶āŗ¶∂ŗßĀ ŗ¶®ŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶¶ŗ¶ĺ
ŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ ŗ¶áŗ¶ęŗßáŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶ł: ŗ¶ęŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶ģ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ęŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶ł
ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į: ŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶°ŗ¶öŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ł.ŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į
ŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßčŗ¶ģŗßčŗ¶∂ŗ¶®: ŗ¶Źŗ¶ģŗ¶Ź+ŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶Źŗ¶áŗ¶ö
ŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßčŗ¶ģŗßčŗ¶∂ŗ¶®: ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶≤ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ó ŗ¶Üŗ¶áŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺ
ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶∂ŗ¶®ŗ¶ł: ŗ¶áŗ¶Čŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ ŗ¶ēŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶∂ŗ¶®ŗ¶ł
ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶Źŗ¶ģŗ¶ď ŗ¶ď ŗ¶Ļŗßáŗ¶° ŗ¶Öŗ¶ę ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶∂ŗ¶®: ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗßÄŗ¶į ŗ¶öŗßčŗ¶™ŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺ
ŗ¶°ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Čŗ¶Źŗ¶łŗ¶Źŗ¶ę ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶ā: ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ßŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶∂ŗßáŗ¶†ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶ßŗßćŗ¶įŗßĀŗ¶¨ ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶óŗßĆŗ¶§ŗ¶ģ ŗ¶Üŗ¶ĻŗßĀŗ¶úŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶Öŗ¶®ŗßĀŗ¶∑ŗßćŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Öŗ¶įŗßčŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ, ŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶āŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņ, ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶§

ŗłĀŗł≥ŗłĀŗłĪŗłöŗłčŗłĶŗł£ŗłĶŗł™ŗĻĆ : ŗłôŗłěŗłďŗłĪŗłä ŗłäŗłĪŗłĘŗłßŗłīŗł°ŗł•

 ŗł£ŗł≤ŗłĘŗłäŗł∑ŗĻąŗł≠ŗłôŗłĪŗłĀŗĻĀŗł™ŗłĒŗłá
 ŗĻÄŗłąŗł°ŗłĶŗĻĄŗłôŗłôŗĻĆ ŗłôŗł£ŗłßŗłīŗłäŗłćŗĻĆ ŗłźŗłīŗłēŗłīŗĻÄŗłąŗł£ŗłīŗłćŗł£ŗłĪŗłĀŗł©ŗĻĆ ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗłöŗł≤ŗł£ŗĻĆŗłė
 ŗĻāŗłüŗł£ŗĻĆŗłó ŗłďŗłĪŗłźŗłßŗł£ŗł£ŗłėŗłôŗĻĆ ŗłąŗłīŗĻāŗł£ŗłäŗłôŗĻĆŗłėŗłīŗłĀŗłłŗł•  ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗĻĀŗłóŗłôŗł£ŗłĪŗłĀ
 ŗł≠ŗłäŗłī ŗłěŗłĶŗł£ŗłįŗłĀŗł≤ŗłôŗłēŗĻĆ ŗĻÄŗłēŗłĶŗłĘŗłßŗł™ŗłłŗłßŗł£ŗł£ŗłď             ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗłĄŗłáŗĻÄŗłĒŗłä
 ŗł≠ŗłĪŗĻčŗłô ŗłäŗłĪŗłĘŗłěŗł£ ŗĻāŗł≠ŗł•ŗłĶŗĻÄŗłßŗłĶŗłĘ ŗłěŗłĻŗłěŗł≤ŗł£ŗĻĆŗłē               ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗłĄŗłłŗłďŗłěŗĻąŗł≠ŗł≠ŗł≤ŗłôŗłôŗłóŗĻĆ
 ŗĻĄŗłöŗł£ŗĻĆŗłó ŗł£ŗłěŗłĶŗłěŗłáŗł®ŗĻĆ ŗłóŗłĪŗłöŗł™ŗłłŗłßŗł£ŗł£ŗłď                ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗł°ŗł≤ŗł™ŗĻÄŗłēŗł≠ŗł£ŗĻĆŗł†ŗł≤ŗłĄ
 ŗłôŗłĀ ŗł™ŗłīŗłôŗłąŗłĪŗłĘ ŗĻÄŗłõŗł•ŗĻąŗłáŗłěŗł≤ŗłôŗłīŗłä                     ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗłöŗłłŗł©ŗłĘŗł≤ (ŗĻĀŗł°ŗĻąŗłöŗł≤ŗł£ŗĻĆŗłė)
 ŗłēŗĻČŗł≠ŗł° ŗłěŗł•ŗłßŗłĪŗłíŗłôŗĻĆ ŗł°ŗłôŗłĻŗłõŗł£ŗłįŗĻÄŗł™ŗł£ŗłīŗłź             ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗłěŗĻąŗł≠ŗłöŗł≤ŗł£ŗĻĆŗłė
 ŗłēŗĻČŗł≠ ŗł†ŗłĄŗłßŗłĪŗłē ŗłēŗłĪŗĻČŗłáŗłČŗłĪŗłēŗł£ŗĻĀŗłĀŗĻČŗłß                     ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗł£ŗłīŗłß
 ŗłĀŗłĶŗłēŗł≤ŗł£ŗĻĆ ŗł®ŗłłŗł†ŗłĀŗł£ ŗłĀŗłĪŗłôŗłóŗłôŗłīŗłēŗłĘŗĻĆ                     ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗłõŗł£ŗłīŗĻČŗłôŗłčŗĻĆ
 ŗł°ŗłłŗłĀ ŗłäŗłćŗł≤ŗłĒŗł≤ ŗł≠ŗłįŗłĀŗłīŗłĘŗł≤ŗł°ŗłį                    ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗĻÄŗłäŗł≠ŗł£ŗĻĆŗł£ŗłĶŗĻą
 ŗł°ŗłĪŗłôŗłēŗł£ŗł≤ ŗłėŗł°ŗłôŗłēŗĻĆŗłäŗłīŗłēŗł≤ ŗłôŗł≤ŗł°ŗłĀŗłĻŗł•              ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗĻāŗł≠ŗĻč
 ŗłõŗłłŗłô ŗłõŗłłŗłćŗłĘŗĻĆ ŗł™ŗłłŗłēŗł≤ŗł£ŗł°ŗłąŗĻĆ                             ŗł£ŗłĪŗłöŗłöŗłó  ŗłĀŗĻČŗł≠ŗłáŗłĀŗłīŗłą

ŗĻÄŗłěŗł•ŗłáŗłõŗł£ŗłįŗłĀŗł≠ŗłöŗłčŗłĶŗł£ŗłĶŗł™ŗĻĆ

snippet.title: Welcome to the Jungle (Title Track) | Akshay Kumar | Disha Patani | Shaan | Vikram Montrose| Priya P
snippet.description:
Get ready to experience madness, comedy, and power-packed new Bollywood song ‚ÄėWelcome to the Jungle Title Track‚Äô ūüéČūüĒ• with vocals by Shaan, Priya Patidar, and Vikram Montrose. With new lyrics by Meggha Bali, music re-created and produced by Vikram Montrose & originally composed by Sajid Wajid, this welcome song blends nostalgic energy with a bold new-age sound.
 
#welcometothejungle #akshaykumar #bollywoodsong #dishapatani #bollywoodmusic #sunielshetty #dancesong

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali¬†

snippet.title: Rikesh Gurung Keys - Laijau Malai | Official Song
snippet.description:
Rikesh Gurung Keys - Laijau Malai | Official Song

Lyrics 

khelchha , kura haru 
kuna , kuna ma
laijau timi sangai 
malai kalpanama

tyo man sanga manaile 
kura haru sataula 
aadha aadha bataula 
aadha aadha hasaula 

laijau malai laijau 
timi sangai laijau
laijau malai laijau
mero haath samai laijau


phool manparaune , hajarau hunchhan
tyo hajarau ma ek ma chhu
herchhu tadhai bata , hawale najik leuchhan 
yo hawama timi ra ma chhu 

sabai sahana raaji chhu 
ma timrai huna baki chhu 
jaha jaha janchhau timi 
ma timrai aaghi pachhi chhu 

laijau malai laijau 
timi sangai laijau
laijau malai laijau
mero haath samai laijau

snippet.title: Sushant KC - Bela Bela (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
‚ÄėBela Bela‚Äô finally found its home on Sushant KC‚Äôs channel.

And it carries a subtle reminder that love isn‚Äôt perfect. Love isn‚Äôt always easy, but maybe it‚Äôs the little mistakes, the silences, the considerations, the compromises, and everything we learn along the way that make love feel real. Bela bela ma ta bhool bhaihalcha ni!

A relaxed, intimate one-take for a song many of you first discovered through the film ‚ÄėRammita Ko Pirati.‚Äô Because some music doesn‚Äôt need too much.

I hope this stays with you for a while. ‚Ě§ÔłŹ

Written/Composed/Performed by: Sushant KC
Music Produced by: Eskecy and Saswot Shrestha
Mix/Master: Saswot Shrestha (Omniphonics studio)

snippet.title: Shararat - 8K Video | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Shashwat S, Jasmine, Madhubanti, Ayesha, Krystle
snippet.description:
Shararat in stunning 8K brings playful vibes and infectious energy in ultra-high definition.

ūüĎČ Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Song Name: Shararat
Music: Shashwat Sachdev
Singers: Madhubanti Bagchi, Jasmine Sandlas
Lyrics: Jasmine Sandlas, Shashwat Sachdev

Lyrics:
Tune parda uthaaya, haaye kya baat ho gayi 
Haaye 
Ye mulakaat, vaardaat ho gayi 
Nain milaaye humne ik dooje se yoon 
Raat hui 
Phir din 
Phir se raat ho gayi 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Ik afeemi main chaskha chakhaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Aye Haye Tum bhi ho tanha 
Aur hum akele Jo saath huye laajawab ho gaye 
Tum bhi haseen aur hum aashqeen 
Jo raat huyi benaqaab ho gaye 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Gulabi ye sharbat pilaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik rangeela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan

#Shararat
#dhurandhar 
#ranveersingh 
#shashwatsachdev 
#madhubantibagchi 
#JasmineSandlas

snippet.title: 1000 Players Simulate UNDERGROUND Civilization in Minecraft
snippet.description:
kingdom of the caves

1000 Players Simulate UNDERGROUND Civilization in Minecraft

Unstable SMP:
‚ěú  ‚Ā®@FlameFragsMC 
‚ěú  @Spokeishere 
‚ěú  @ParrotX2 
‚ěú  ‚Ā®@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @yungymc @JadenMAN @FlameFragsMC @saparata @ParrotX2 @TheobaldTheBird 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/user/andreaszoellermusic
https://www.youtube.com/@Kalamity_Music

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

snippet.title: Amrisu Music - SALI HOO (Official music video)(Prod by - @gorkhaymusic ||Tharu rap song ||Tharu song
snippet.description:
SONG WRITER, COMPOSER, VOCALIST :- Amrisu Music 
MIX MASTER BY:- Butwal sound Scape 
BEAT PRODUCER :- @gorkhaymusic
Amrisu Music: ¬†¬†¬†/¬†amrit.tharu.5055¬†¬†‚Äč

 Big Thanks To
 
TIKRAM THARU 
SUJIT THARU 
ASHMA THARU
HEMANT THARU
ASHISH THARU

LYRICS:-

Tohar vhatu chaudgaran ghar k 
Tension na leo khan pan k 
Katil ba adaa tohar jyan na maro jaan jan k
Xoro tuh beggi pant suhaitho gahna sutiya me ho
Nano sali jaar k jhor mai baithal batu khatiya me 
Hah

Larhiya te nai ho sali mela chali tractor se
Heroni banbo sali bolo call milau director he 
Director xoro mayak direction dekhaim tohar didi ja fe kahhi tb fe maya mai lagaim 

Katho maya lagal vhatu lekin hertho kabo nai 
Furhun maya kartho ki tu muhin detho ho sajay 
Sajay deho lekin pyar se thorik
Sali vhatuk rista nata xoro banjao tuh morik

Sali aadhi ghar wali kathai pura mai banalu 
Bato lobh lagtik sughar sochthu maya fe lagalu
Mai te lagaibu ho sali maiya tohar ka bichar bawe
Atna sughar kaise kaucha sundarta k raaj bawe
 
Ghana daili sali barda oo vhaisa le 
Ha sali vhatuk maya keu fe kine na seki paisa le 
E maya lagaina karan te bahute dher bawe lekin 
Maya lagal sali tohar baisa le

Maya te lagal sali kahe janek paral 
Khali risaile se nai hoith milke rahe janek paral 
Janek te paral tharu jati kahna ka ho 
Apan purkhauli sanskar sange laike chalek paral 
Tharu madra k taal 
Maghi naya ho saal 
Morik aankhi ba laal 
Pi k andi k jaar 
Hathem surik sikar 
Sub or tharuk jaykar
Ulta sidha bole se tai pahile kailehas bichar

Dekho Korea Japan me fe tharu k bakhan 
Pure bishwo bhar me famous haman tharu pahichan 
Haman alag khan pan haman chutte bawe shan 
Tabbe kathai tharu cast nai ho hobe e brand


#SALIHOO#Tharu#amrisu
||Tharu song , Tharu rap song , new Tharu song ||

Lyrics:
All the pretty girls in the foreground of my mind
I thought I‚Äôd done enough, but they keep moving the line
I thought I found the antidote this time

Aate hain kyu khaab

Aasu behisaab kyu
Aasu behisaab

Jaan se jaa na paaye hum

Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Inkaar ke bahaane kayi baar karte karte

Jahaan dil lagana mana tha
Akhir wahin kiye sajde jahan
Sar jhukana mana tha
Kyu zindagi bita di jahaan pe
ik pal bitaana mana tha
Kyu us gali mein rehte they hum
Jahaan roz jaana mana tha

Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye
Jo duaayein dete they
Haan usi ke hothon se
Aise waise lafz bhi
Humse bole hain gaye

baitho kisi roz tanhai mein
Rakho samne wakt ke aaine
Jo aagea chehra nazar vo kahin
Tumhe bewafa kehke has na pade

Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe
Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe

Humne wahin lagaya dil jahan dil lagana mana tha

snippet.title: Ek Pal Ki Khushi ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Ek Pal Ki Khushi ‚Äď Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe

---

Ek pal ki khushi thi‚Ä¶
phir zindagi
wahi udaas ho gayi.

Jise paakar laga tha
sab mil gaya‚Ä¶
use khokar
sab adhura ho gaya.

‚ÄúEk Pal Ki Khushi‚ÄĚ
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jise mohabbat mili bhi‚Ä¶
par sirf kuch pal ke liye.

Is gaane mein
khushi bhi hai,
dard bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai ‚ÄĒ

kaash wo pal
thoda aur ruk jaata‚Ä¶

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ke saath
thodi si khushi jee ho
aur phir use kho diya ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

snippet.description:
THE ULTIMATE SHOWDOWN IS HERE! ūüŹÜ WELCOME TO THE FFWS NEPAL GRAND FINALS WATCHPARTY! ūüá≥ūüáĶūüĒ•

‚ÄčThe biggest day in Nepal's Free Fire history has finally arrived! The absolute best teams in the country‚ÄĒHORAA Esports, TGR, and DRS Gaming‚ÄĒare entering the server for the ultimate battle of survival, strategy, and pure skill! ūüĎĎ‚öĒÔłŹ Only one team will lift the prestigious trophy and become the official champion of Nepal! ūüŹÜūüĆŹ

‚ÄčI am live with the A4 Gamer Grand Final Watchparty to catch every insane clutch, every squad wipe, and every legendary Booyah! The calculations are real, the tension is high, and the lobby is going to be pure chaos! ūüĒīūüéģ

‚ÄčGrand Final Watchparty: Live match tracking, point table updates, and hype reactions! ūüďäūüĒ•

‚ÄčCommunity Power: Let‚Äôs flood the chat and show the power of the Nepali gaming community! ūüí¨ūüá≥ūüáĶ

snippet.title: Tera Chehra 8K/4K Music Video | Arijit Singh | Harshvardhan | Himesh Reshammiya | Sanam Teri Kasam
snippet.description:
Experience the timeless romance of Tera Chehra from the film Sanam Teri Kasam in stunning 8K/4K quality. Featuring Harshvardhan Rane and Mawra Hocane this soulful track is sung by Arijit Singh with composed by Himesh Reshammiya.

#terachehra #8k #arijitsingh #8kvideo  #sanamterikasam #harshvardhanrane #himeshreshammiya

Credits:
Song - Tera Chehra
Singer - Arijit Singh
Composer - Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist - Himesh Reshammiya, Shabbir Ahmedd

Lyrics:
Meri bechainiyon ko chain mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Mere deewanepan ko sabr mil jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na aankhon se
bheega bheega pyaar beh jaata hai

Meri tanhaiyon ko noor mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Main raat-din ye duaa karun
Tere liye main jiyun marun
Chaaron pehar tujhe dekha karun
Mera jahan ye tujhpe fanaa karun

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na honthon pe tera ehsaas
Reh jaata hai

Mere har raaste ko manzil mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

Berang hawayein mujhe naa jaane
De gayi sadaa kyun abhi abhi
Hai sarfaroshi ye aashiqui bhi
Jaayegi jaan meri isme kabhi

Zikr tumhara jab jab hota hai
Dekho na har lamha teri daastaan
keh jaata hai

Meri har ik tadap ko sukoon mill jaaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye
Tera chehra jab nazar aaye

snippet.title: ROBLOX BE A THIEF..
snippet.description:
Today I became a thief in roblox. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

id.description:
Hari ini aku menjadi pencuri di Roblox. Pastikan kalian menonton seluruh video untuk mengetahui apa yang terjadi.

Nama Roblox: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. ROBLOX unik karena hampir semua hal di dalamnya dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun ‚ÄĒ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

#Roblox #foltyn

nl-NL.description:
Vandaag ben ik een dief geworden in Roblox. Kijk de hele video om te zien wat er gebeurt.

Roblox-naam: TheRealFoltyn

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Wat is Roblox? ROBLOX is een online virtuele speelplaats en werkplaats waar kinderen van alle leeftijden veilig kunnen spelen, cre√ęren, plezier hebben en leren. Het is uniek omdat vrijwel alles op ROBLOX is ontworpen en gebouwd door leden van de community. ROBLOX is ontworpen voor jongeren van 13 tot 18 jaar, maar is toegankelijk voor mensen van alle leeftijden. Elke speler begint met het kiezen van een avatar en het geven van een identiteit. Vervolgens kunnen ze ROBLOX verkennen en interactie hebben met anderen door te chatten, games te spelen of samen te werken aan creatieve projecten. Elke speler krijgt ook een eigen stuk onontwikkeld virtueel land, samen met een virtuele gereedschapskist waarmee ze van alles kunnen ontwerpen en bouwen ‚Äď of het nu een begaanbare wolkenkrabber, een werkende helikopter, een gigantische flipperkast, een multiplayer 'Capture the Flag'-spel of een andere, nog te bedenken creatie is. Dit eerste stuk virtuele land is gratis. Door deel te nemen en coole dingen te bouwen, kunnen ROBLOX-leden speciale badges en ROBLOX-dollars ('Robux') verdienen. Hiermee kunnen ze vervolgens in de online catalogus winkelen om kleding en accessoires voor hun avatar te kopen, evenals premium bouwmaterialen, interactieve componenten en werkende mechanismen.

#Roblox #foltyn

ŗīöŗīĺŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć ŗīöŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶćŗī§ŗĶĀŗīēŗĶäŗī£ŗĶćŗīüŗĶč, ŗīóŗĶÜŗīĮŗīŅŗīģŗĶĀŗīēŗĶĺ ŗīēŗī≥ŗīŅŗīöŗĶćŗīöŗĶč, ŗīÖŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶÜŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗīłŗĶÉŗī∑ŗĶćŗīüŗīŅŗī™ŗīįŗīģŗīĺŗīĮ ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗĶčŗīúŗīēŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶĀŗīēŗī≥ŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗīłŗīĻŗīēŗīįŗīŅŗīöŗĶćŗīöŗĶč ŗīģŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶĀŗī≥ŗĶćŗī≥ŗīĶŗīįŗĶĀŗīģŗīĺŗīĮŗīŅ ŗīáŗīüŗī™ŗīīŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ. ŗīďŗīįŗĶč ŗīēŗī≥ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīĺŗīįŗī®ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīÖŗīĶŗīįŗĶĀŗīüŗĶáŗī§ŗīĺŗīĮ ŗīĶŗīŅŗīēŗīłŗīŅŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ ŗīĪŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĹ ŗīéŗīłŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶáŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć ŗīēŗī∑ŗī£ŗīĶŗĶĀŗīā, ŗīéŗī®ŗĶćŗī§ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīįŗĶāŗī™ŗīēŗĶĹŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗī® ŗīöŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī®ŗĶĀŗīā ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīĺŗī®ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīēŗīīŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīĶŗĶÜŗĶľŗīöŗĶćŗīĶŗĶĹ ŗīüŗĶāŗĶĺŗī¨ŗĶčŗīēŗĶćŗīłŗĶĀŗīā ŗī®ŗĶĹŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ - ŗīÖŗī§ŗĶć ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗī®ŗīĺŗīĶŗīŅŗīóŗĶáŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶć ŗīöŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗīĶŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīÖŗīāŗī¨ŗīįŗīöŗĶĀŗīāŗī¨ŗīŅ, ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīĶŗĶľŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī® ŗīĻŗĶÜŗī≤ŗīŅŗīēŗĶčŗī™ŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶľ, ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗī≠ŗĶÄŗīģŗĶĽ ŗī™ŗīŅŗĶĽŗī¨ŗĶčŗĶĺ ŗīģŗĶÜŗī∑ŗĶÄŗĶĽ, ŗīíŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīģŗĶĺŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗīŅŗī™ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶľ "ŗīēŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī™ŗĶćŗīöŗĶľ ŗī¶ŗīŅ ŗīęŗĶćŗī≤ŗīĺŗīóŗĶć" ŗīóŗĶÜŗīĮŗīŅŗīā ŗīÖŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶÜŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗīģŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶáŗī§ŗĶÜŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶĀŗīā, ŗīáŗī§ŗĶĀŗīĶŗīįŗĶÜ ŗīłŗĶćŗīĶŗī™ŗĶćŗī®ŗīā ŗīēŗīĺŗī£ŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ ŗīłŗĶÉŗī∑ŗĶćŗīüŗīŅ. ŗīĶŗĶÜŗĶľŗīöŗĶćŗīĶŗĶĹ ŗī≠ŗĶāŗīģŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīüŗĶÜ ŗīą ŗīÜŗī¶ŗĶćŗīĮ ŗī™ŗĶćŗī≤ŗĶčŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗīŅŗī®ŗĶć ŗīĮŗīĺŗī§ŗĶäŗīįŗĶĀ ŗīöŗĶÜŗī≤ŗīĶŗĶĀŗīģŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤. ŗī™ŗīôŗĶćŗīēŗĶÜŗīüŗĶĀŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶāŗīüŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā ŗīįŗīłŗīēŗīįŗīģŗīĺŗīĮ ŗīēŗīĺŗīįŗĶćŗīĮŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶāŗīüŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā, ROBLOX ŗīÖŗīāŗīóŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶć ŗīłŗĶćŗī™ŗĶÜŗī∑ŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī≤ŗīŅŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīŅ ŗī¨ŗīĺŗī°ŗĶćŗīúŗĶĀŗīēŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ROBLOX ŗī°ŗĶčŗī≥ŗīĪŗĶĀŗīēŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ("Robux") ŗī®ŗĶáŗīüŗīĺŗĶĽ ŗīēŗīīŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā. ŗīÖŗī§ŗīĺŗīēŗīüŗĶćŗīüŗĶÜ, ŗīÖŗīĶŗī§ŗīĺŗĶľ ŗīĶŗīłŗĶćŗī§ŗĶćŗīįŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīÖŗī®ŗĶĀŗī¨ŗī®ŗĶćŗīß ŗīČŗī™ŗīēŗīįŗī£ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗī≥ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīĶŗīĺŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗī§ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶć ŗīďŗĶļŗī≤ŗĶąŗĶĽ ŗīēŗīĺŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗī≤ŗĶčŗīóŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗī®ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶć ŗīĶŗīĺŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗīĺŗī®ŗĶĀŗīā ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗĶÄŗīģŗīŅŗīĮŗīā ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīĺŗī£ ŗīłŗīĺŗīģŗīóŗĶćŗīįŗīŅŗīēŗĶĺ, ŗīłŗīāŗīĶŗĶáŗī¶ŗī®ŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗīģŗīē ŗīėŗīüŗīēŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ, ŗī™ŗĶćŗīįŗīĶŗĶľŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗī® ŗīłŗīāŗīĶŗīŅŗīßŗīĺŗī®ŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ ŗīéŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗīŅŗīĶ ŗīĶŗīĺŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗīĺŗī®ŗĶĀŗīā ŗīēŗīīŗīŅŗīĮŗĶĀŗīā.

ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ —ć—ā–ĺ –ĺ–Ĺ–Ľ–į–Ļ–Ĺ-–≤–ł—Ä—ā—É–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–į—Ź –ł–≥—Ä–ĺ–≤–į—Ź –Ņ–Ľ–ĺ—Č–į–ī–ļ–į –ł –ľ–į—Ā—ā–Ķ—Ä—Ā–ļ–į—Ź, –≥–ī–Ķ –ī–Ķ—ā–ł –≤—Ā–Ķ—Ö –≤–ĺ–∑—Ä–į—Ā—ā–ĺ–≤ –ľ–ĺ–≥—É—ā –Ī–Ķ–∑–ĺ–Ņ–į—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ –ĺ–Ī—Č–į—ā—Ć—Ā—Ź, —ā–≤–ĺ—Ä–ł—ā—Ć, —Ä–į–∑–≤–Ľ–Ķ–ļ–į—ā—Ć—Ā—Ź –ł —É—á–ł—ā—Ć—Ā—Ź. –ē–≥–ĺ —É–Ĺ–ł–ļ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ—Ā—ā—Ć –∑–į–ļ–Ľ—é—á–į–Ķ—ā—Ā—Ź –≤ —ā–ĺ–ľ, —á—ā–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–į–ļ—ā–ł—á–Ķ—Ā–ļ–ł –≤—Ā—Ď –≤ ROBLOX —Ā–ĺ–∑–ī–į—Ď—ā—Ā—Ź –ł —Ä–į–∑—Ä–į–Ī–į—ā—č–≤–į–Ķ—ā—Ā—Ź —á–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–į–ľ–ł —Ā–ĺ–ĺ–Ī—Č–Ķ—Ā—ā–≤–į. ROBLOX –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī–Ĺ–į–∑–Ĺ–į—á–Ķ–Ĺ –ī–Ľ—Ź –Ņ–ĺ–ī—Ä–ĺ—Ā—ā–ļ–ĺ–≤ –ĺ—ā 13 –ī–ĺ 18 –Ľ–Ķ—ā, –Ĺ–ĺ –ĺ—ā–ļ—Ä—č—ā –ī–Ľ—Ź –Ľ—é–ī–Ķ–Ļ –≤—Ā–Ķ—Ö –≤–ĺ–∑—Ä–į—Ā—ā–ĺ–≤. –ö–į–∂–ī—č–Ļ –ł–≥—Ä–ĺ–ļ –Ĺ–į—á–ł–Ĺ–į–Ķ—ā —Ā –≤—č–Ī–ĺ—Ä–į –į–≤–į—ā–į—Ä–į –ł –Ņ—Ä–ł—Ā–≤–ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—Ź –Ķ–ľ—É –ł–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł. –ó–į—ā–Ķ–ľ –ĺ–Ĺ –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ķ—ā –ł—Ā—Ā–Ľ–Ķ–ī–ĺ–≤–į—ā—Ć ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ –≤–∑–į–ł–ľ–ĺ–ī–Ķ–Ļ—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ–≤–į—ā—Ć —Ā –ī—Ä—É–≥–ł–ľ–ł, –ĺ–Ī—Č–į—Ź—Ā—Ć –≤ —á–į—ā–Ķ, –ł–≥—Ä–į—Ź –≤ –ł–≥—Ä—č –ł–Ľ–ł —Ā–ĺ—ā—Ä—É–ī–Ĺ–ł—á–į—Ź –Ĺ–į–ī —ā–≤–ĺ—Ä—á–Ķ—Ā–ļ–ł–ľ–ł –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ķ–ļ—ā–į–ľ–ł. –ö–į–∂–ī–ĺ–ľ—É –ł–≥—Ä–ĺ–ļ—É —ā–į–ļ–∂–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī–ĺ—Ā—ā–į–≤–Ľ—Ź–Ķ—ā—Ā—Ź —Ā–ĺ–Ī—Ā—ā–≤–Ķ–Ĺ–Ĺ—č–Ļ —É—á–į—Ā—ā–ĺ–ļ –Ĺ–Ķ–ĺ–Ī—Ä–į–Ī–ĺ—ā–į–Ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ–Ļ –≤–ł—Ä—ā—É–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ–Ļ –∑–Ķ–ľ–Ľ–ł –≤–ľ–Ķ—Ā—ā–Ķ —Ā –≤–ł—Ä—ā—É–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č–ľ –Ĺ–į–Ī–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–ľ –ł–Ĺ—Ā—ā—Ä—É–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ—ā–ĺ–≤, —Ā –Ņ–ĺ–ľ–ĺ—Č—Ć—é –ļ–ĺ—ā–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ĺ–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ķ–ļ—ā–ł—Ä–ĺ–≤–į—ā—Ć –ł —Ā—ā—Ä–ĺ–ł—ā—Ć —á—ā–ĺ —É–≥–ĺ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ ‚ÄĒ –Ī—É–ī—Ć —ā–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ–Ī–ĺ—Ā–ļ—Ä—Ď–Ī, –Ņ–ĺ –ļ–ĺ—ā–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–ľ—É –ľ–ĺ–∂–Ĺ–ĺ –Ņ–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–ľ–Ķ—Č–į—ā—Ć—Ā—Ź, —Ä–į–Ī–ĺ—ā–į—é—Č–ł–Ļ –≤–Ķ—Ä—ā–ĺ–Ľ—Ď—ā, –≥–ł–≥–į–Ĺ—ā—Ā–ļ–ł–Ļ –Ņ–ł–Ĺ–Ī–ĺ–Ľ, –ľ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ–Ņ–ĺ–Ľ—Ć–∑–ĺ–≤–į—ā–Ķ–Ľ—Ć—Ā–ļ–į—Ź –ł–≥—Ä–į ¬ę–ó–į—Ö–≤–į—ā —Ą–Ľ–į–≥–į¬Ľ –ł–Ľ–ł –ļ–į–ļ–ĺ–Ķ-–Ľ–ł–Ī–ĺ –ī—Ä—É–≥–ĺ–Ķ, –Ķ—Č—Ď –Ĺ–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–ł–ī—É–ľ–į–Ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ–Ķ —ā–≤–ĺ—Ä–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ. –ü–Ķ—Ä–≤—č–Ļ —É—á–į—Ā—ā–ĺ–ļ –≤–ł—Ä—ā—É–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ–Ļ –∑–Ķ–ľ–Ľ–ł –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī–ĺ—Ā—ā–į–≤–Ľ—Ź–Ķ—ā—Ā—Ź –Ī–Ķ—Ā–Ņ–Ľ–į—ā–Ĺ–ĺ. –£—á–į—Ā—ā–≤—É—Ź –ł —Ā–ĺ–∑–ī–į–≤–į—Ź –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ā–Ĺ—č–Ķ –≤–Ķ—Č–ł, —É—á–į—Ā—ā–Ĺ–ł–ļ–ł ROBLOX –ľ–ĺ–≥—É—ā –∑–į—Ä–į–Ī–į—ā—č–≤–į—ā—Ć —Ā–Ņ–Ķ—Ü–ł–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č–Ķ –∑–Ĺ–į—á–ļ–ł, –į —ā–į–ļ–∂–Ķ –≤–ł—Ä—ā—É–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—É—é –≤–į–Ľ—é—ā—É ROBLOX (¬ęRobux¬Ľ). –í —Ā–≤–ĺ—é –ĺ—á–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–ī—Ć, –ĺ–Ĺ–ł –ľ–ĺ–≥—É—ā –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—Ā–ľ–į—ā—Ä–ł–≤–į—ā—Ć –ĺ–Ĺ–Ľ–į–Ļ–Ĺ-–ļ–į—ā–į–Ľ–ĺ–≥, —á—ā–ĺ–Ī—č –Ņ—Ä–ł–ĺ–Ī—Ä–Ķ—Ā—ā–ł –ĺ–ī–Ķ–∂–ī—É –ł –į–ļ—Ā–Ķ—Ā—Ā—É–į—Ä—č –ī–Ľ—Ź –į–≤–į—ā–į—Ä–ĺ–≤, –į —ā–į–ļ–∂–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ľ–ł–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č–Ķ —Ā—ā—Ä–ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č–Ķ –ľ–į—ā–Ķ—Ä–ł–į–Ľ—č, –ł–Ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ä–į–ļ—ā–ł–≤–Ĺ—č–Ķ –ļ–ĺ–ľ–Ņ–ĺ–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ—ā—č –ł —Ä–į–Ī–ĺ—á–ł–Ķ –ľ–Ķ—Ö–į–Ĺ–ł–∑–ľ—č.

snippet.title: Unstable SMP: Civil War
snippet.description:
After I Became King of the Unstable SMP, the world split into two different sides: the new players, and the old ones. Soon enough, most of these players left my Kingdom and joined Cindercrest. And just like that... a Civil War had begun. 

Unstable SMP:
‚ěú ‚Ä™  ‚Ä™  ‚Ä™‚Ä™@FlameFragsMC 
‚ěú     @wemmbumc 
‚ěú     ‚Ä™‚Ä™@Spokeishere 
‚ěú     @ParrotX2  

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

Air Defense System and Arrow Orbital Cannon created by @cubicmetre 

Blimp design: https://youtu.be/IZTobBVAJ6U?si=ZxKF8R9OQSHcCu1y 

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird @FlameFragsMC@saparata  @Lomedy @fymada @4CVIT @yungymc 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!
